title: Quality-gate success record (build-pass)
description: Appended by feature-implementer when the quality gate (make ci) passes. Replaces the legacy 'delete build-failure.md on success' semantics: append-only requires an explicit success marker so the coordinator can route to reviewers based on the latest build-* record being a pass. The retry trail (preceding build-failure records) is preserved for diagnostic purposes.

gate_checks_run.description: Which gate checks ran and passed (e.g. ["build", "test", "lint", "fmt", "vet", "deps-check"]). Optional; if absent, assume the full make-ci suite.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock time spent in the gate. Optional, useful for monitoring.
